name: grep
description: Search for text patterns in files using regular expressions and print matching lines

options.label: Recursive
options.description: Recursively search all files under each directory

options.label: Line numbers
options.description: Prefix each line of output with the line number within its file

options.label: Count
options.description: Print only a count of matching lines per file instead of the lines themselves

options.label: Invert match
options.description: Select lines that do not match the pattern

options.label: Extended regex
options.description: Interpret the pattern as an extended regular expression (ERE)

options.label: Context lines
options.description: Print the specified number of lines of context before and after each match

validation.message: Context lines must be 0 or greater

options.label: Include pattern
options.description: Only search files matching the given filename glob pattern (e.g., *.js)

options.label: Exclude pattern
options.description: Skip files matching the given filename glob pattern (e.g., *.min.js)

positionalArgs.label: Pattern
positionalArgs.description: The regular expression pattern to search for

positionalArgs.label: Files
positionalArgs.description: Files or directories to search in

examples.label: Search for a pattern recursively in JavaScript files
Count occurrences of a pattern using extended regex
Case-insensitive recursive search with line numbers
Count matches per file across a project
Search specific file types excluding minified files
